Alright, so we need to determine if Christie is truthful. To do that, we need to work through the chain and see if each person's statement leads to a consistency or contradiction. So Shalonda lies. Now, moving on to Helene. Helene says Shalonda tells the truth. But we just determined that Shalonda is a liar, so Shalonda does not tell the truth.
